ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time the user last changed their password */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of consecutive failed login attempts */,
  "account_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is locked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions assigned to the role */,
  "default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a default role for new users */,
  "editable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can be edited by administrators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., RSI > 70, Price Movement = 1) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was last triggered */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert is currently enabled */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, view data, run analysis) */,
  "accessed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the activity occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioned_data" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each versioned data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original data entry */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the versioned data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON object containing the versioned data */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of versioning */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
